# imager Provider

Uploads Talos disk images (*.raw.xz) into Hetzner Cloud and creates snapshot images.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    imager = {
      source = "hcloud-talos/imager"
    }
  }
}

provider "imager" {
  # token = var.hcloud_token
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `token` (String, Sensitive) Hetzner Cloud API token. Can also be set via the HCLOUD_TOKEN environment variable.
